meanings.usage: 可数名词，单复数同形，指依靠气垫支撑航行的交通工具
表示“交通工具/运输方式”时为不可数名词
指通过交通工具运送人或货物
仅用于名词前，修饰名词表示该身份已经不存在
作为学科时为不可数名词，作“电子器件”时常用复数形式
多用于修饰和工业生产、行业相关的名词，如industrial circles工业界
文中指支撑气垫船的空气垫，也可指日常的坐垫、靠垫
泛指各类陆上、水上、空中的运载工具，为可数名词
表示物理意义上的阻力时为不可数名词，wave resistance即波浪阻力
正式用语，指代各类水上船只，也可指盛放物品的容器
文中air jet指喷气口，也可指代喷气式飞行器
cause a sensation为固定搭配，指引起轰动
文中指气垫船驶上海滩，也可表示安装设备、登上山峰等含义
可数名词，常指海边或沙漠里由沙子堆积形成的丘状地貌
多指热带地区大规模种植经济作物的农场，如香蕉种植园、橡胶种植园
文中hovercraft liner指气垫客轮，也可指衣物等的内衬

phrases.usage: 表示“转向，开始从事（新的工作、行业）”，后接名词或动名词

examples.en: He had turned to boat-building on the Norfolk Broads.
examples.zh: 他转而在诺福克湖区从事造船工作。

examples.en: After graduating from art school, she turned to fashion design.
examples.zh: 从艺术学校毕业后，她转而从事服装设计工作。

phrases.usage: 表示“做某事有困难”，介词in可以省略

examples.en: Ever since, people have had difficulty in deciding whether the craft should be ranged among ships, planes, or land vehicles.
examples.zh: 从那以后，人们一直难以决定这种交通工具到底应该归为船舶、飞机还是陆上车辆。

examples.en: Many beginners have difficulty in pronouncing English words correctly.
examples.zh: 很多初学者在正确发英语单词的音方面有困难。

phrases.usage: 表示“把……归入、划分到某一类中”，常用于被动语态

examples.en: People can not decide whether the craft should be ranged among ships, planes, or land vehicles.
examples.zh: 人们无法决定这种载具是否应该被归为船舶、飞机或者陆上车辆。

examples.en: This new type of mobile device is usually ranged among portable computers.
examples.zh: 这种新型移动设备通常被归为便携式电脑一类。

phrases.usage: 表示“介于……之间”，可作介词短语或表语，说明两种事物的中间状态

examples.en: For it is something in between a boat and an aircraft.
examples.zh: 因为它是介于船和飞机之间的一种东西。

examples.en: The answer is neither yes nor no, it's somewhere in between.
examples.zh: 答案既不是肯定也不是否定，而是介于两者之间。

phrases.usage: 表示“大量的，许多的”，仅用于修饰不可数名词

examples.en: Wave resistance wastes a good deal of a surface ship's power and limits its speed.
examples.zh: 波浪阻力会浪费水面船舶大量的动力，还会限制它的速度。

examples.en: The project took a good deal of time and effort before it was completed.
examples.zh: 这个项目花费了大量时间和精力才完成。

phrases.usage: 表示“仅仅，不超过”，强调数量少或程度低

examples.en: His answer was to lift the vessel out of the water by making it ride on a cushion of air, no more than one or two feet thick.
examples.zh: 他的解决方案是让船只浮在不超过一两英尺厚的气垫上，从而脱离水面。

examples.en: The whole process takes no more than 10 minutes for an experienced worker.
examples.zh: 对于有经验的工人来说，整个过程只需要不超过10分钟。

phrases.usage: 表示“取决于，依靠”，后接名词或名词性结构，说明事物的决定因素

examples.en: Its action depends on the surface, water or ground, over which it rides.
examples.zh: 它的运行取决于它所行驶的表面，无论是水面还是地面。

examples.en: The success of the activity depends on the weather and the number of participants.
examples.zh: 这次活动的成功取决于天气和参与人数。

phrases.usage: 表示“引起轰动，造成轰动效应”，主语通常是新奇的事物或事件

examples.en: The first tests on the Solent in 1959 caused a sensation.
examples.zh: 1959年在索伦特海峡进行的首次测试引起了轰动。

examples.en: The young artist's first exhibition in the city caused a sensation.
examples.zh: 这位年轻艺术家在这座城市的首次展览引起了轰动。

phrases.usage: 表示“开始从事，承担（某项工作、服务）”，文中指开始提供常规服务

examples.en: Since that time, various types of hovercraft have appeared and taken up regular service.
examples.zh: 从那时起，各种类型的气垫船出现了，并开始提供常规服务。

examples.en: The new bus route will take up official operation next month.
examples.zh: 这条新的公交路线将于下月开始正式运营。

phrases.usage: 表示“很可能是，完全可以是”，表达带有肯定倾向的推测

examples.en: The railway of the future may well be the 'hovertrain'.
examples.zh: 未来的铁路很可能就是“气垫火车”。

examples.en: This discovery may well be the most important breakthrough in the field this year.
examples.zh: 这一发现很可能是该领域今年最重要的突破。

grammar.title: 独立主格结构
grammar.definition: 由名词/代词 + 非谓语动词/形容词/副词/介词短语构成的结构，在句中作状语，其逻辑主语和主句主语不一致，因此有独立的逻辑主语，多用于书面语
grammar.structure: 名词/代词 + 现在分词/过去分词/不定式/形容词/副词/介词短语
grammar.usage: 常用于补充说明主句的背景、条件、原因等信息，使句子结构更紧凑，避免重复使用从句

examples.en: Many strange new means of transport have been developed in our century, the strangest of them being perhaps the hovercraft.
examples.zh: 本世纪已研制出许多新奇的交通工具，其中最奇怪的可能要数气垫船了。

examples.en: The test finished, we began to analyze the collected data.
examples.zh: 测试结束后，我们开始分析收集到的数据。

grammar.title: 定语从句的分隔现象
grammar.definition: 定语从句通常直接跟在先行词之后，但有时为了平衡句子结构，会把定语从句和先行词用其他成分（如状语、谓语等）隔开，这种情况就是定语从句的分隔现象
grammar.structure: 先行词 + 其他插入成分 + 关系代词/关系副词引导的定语从句
grammar.usage: 当先行词后面的定语从句过长，而主句谓语部分较短时，常使用分隔结构避免句子头重脚轻，理解时需要先找准先行词

examples.en: In 1953, a former electronics engineer in his fifties, Christopher Cockerell, who had turned to boat-building on the Norfolk Broads, suggested an idea on which he had been working for many years to the British Government and industrial circles.
examples.zh: 1953年，一位年逾五十、曾从事电子行业的工程师，克里斯托弗·科克雷尔，转而在诺福克湖区从事造船工作，他向英国政府和工业界提出了一项他研究了多年的想法。

examples.en: A new teacher will come tomorrow who will teach us English literature.
examples.zh: 明天会来一位新老师，教我们英国文学。

grammar.title: 现在分词作伴随状语
grammar.definition: 现在分词和主句主语为主动关系，所表示的动作和主句动作同时发生，补充说明主句动作发生时的伴随情况
grammar.structure: 主句 + 逗号 + 现在分词短语
grammar.usage: 用于简化复合句，使表达更简洁，现在分词的逻辑主语必须和主句主语一致

examples.en: It can become a 'flying fruit-bowl', carrying bananas from the plantations to the ports.
examples.zh: 它可以成为一个“飞行果盘”，把香蕉从种植园运到港口。

examples.en: The children ran out of the classroom, laughing and talking happily.
examples.zh: 孩子们跑出教室，开心地说着笑着。

sentencePatterns.pattern: Many + 复数名词 + have been developed in + 某段时间, the + 形容词最高级 + of them being perhaps + 具体事物.

original.en: Many strange new means of transport have been developed in our century, the strangest of them being perhaps the hovercraft.
original.zh: 本世纪已研制出许多新奇的交通工具，其中最奇怪的可能要数气垫船了。

imitations.en: Many new types of digital products have been developed in the past decade, the most popular of them being perhaps the smart watch.
imitations.zh: 过去十年里研发出了许多新型数码产品，其中最受欢迎的可能要数智能手表了。

imitations.en: Many new treatment methods have been developed in the medical field in recent years, the most effective of them being perhaps the new targeted therapy.
imitations.zh: 近年来医学领域研发出了许多新的治疗方法，其中最有效的可能要数新型靶向疗法了。

sentencePatterns.pattern: sb was trying to find a solution to the problem of + 问题内容 which + 问题带来的影响.

original.en: As a shipbuilder, Cockerell was trying to find a solution to the problem of the wave resistance which wastes a good deal of a surface ship's power and limits its speed.
original.zh: 作为一名造船师，科克雷尔当时正试图找到解决波浪阻力问题的方案，这种阻力会浪费水面船舶大量的动力，还会限制它的速度。

imitations.en: As an environmental scientist, she is trying to find a solution to the problem of plastic pollution which threatens marine life and pollutes the soil.
imitations.zh: 作为一名环境科学家，她正试图找到解决塑料污染问题的方案，这种污染威胁着海洋生物，还会污染土壤。

imitations.en: As a software engineer, the team leader is trying to find a solution to the problem of system lag which affects user experience and reduces work efficiency.
imitations.zh: 作为一名软件工程师，团队负责人正试图找到解决系统卡顿问题的方案，这种卡顿会影响用户体验，还会降低工作效率。

sentencePatterns.pattern: sth is particularly useful in + 适用场景 such as + 举例; it can + 用途1; + 用途2; and + 用途3 -- the possibilities appear unlimited.

original.en: The hovercraft is particularly useful in large areas with poor communications such as Africa or Australia; it can become a 'flying fruit-bowl', carrying bananas from the plantations to the ports; giant hovercraft liners could span the Atlantic; and the railway of the future may well be the 'hovertrain', riding on its air cushion over a single rail, which it never touches, at speeds, up to 300 m.p.h.--the possibilities appear unlimited.
original.zh: 气垫船在非洲、澳大利亚等交通不发达的大地区特别有用；它可以成为“飞行果盘”，把香蕉从种植园运到港口；大型气垫客轮可以横渡大西洋；未来的铁路很可能是“气垫火车”，依靠气垫在单轨上行驶，不会接触轨道，时速可达300英里——其可能性似乎是无限的。

imitations.en: The portable solar charger is particularly useful in outdoor areas without power supply such as mountainous regions or deserts; it can charge mobile phones and cameras for travellers; it can provide electricity for camping lamps at night; and it can even power small medical equipment in emergency rescue -- the possibilities appear unlimited.
imitations.zh: 便携式太阳能充电器在山区、沙漠等没有供电的户外地区特别有用；它可以为旅行者的手机和相机充电；夜间可以为露营灯供电；在应急救援中甚至可以为小型医疗设备供电——其可能性似乎是无限的。

imitations.en: Artificial intelligence translation tools are particularly useful in cross-cultural communication scenarios such as international conferences or foreign trade negotiations; they can help people who speak different languages communicate smoothly; they can quickly translate a large number of foreign language documents; and they can provide real-time translation services for tourists travelling abroad -- the possibilities appear unlimited.
imitations.zh: 人工智能翻译工具在国际会议、外贸谈判等跨文化交流场景中特别有用；它可以帮助说不同语言的人顺畅沟通；可以快速翻译大量外文文件；还可以为出国旅游的游客提供实时翻译服务——其可能性似乎是无限的。
